name: Sugar Mess - Let's Play Jolly Battle Demo

reviews.review_description: Vibrant colors create an atmosphere that puts you in the mood for fun. Despite the happy theme, the shooting against the sweets is actually quite chaotic.

developer_response.body: So exciting to get such feedbacks! ;)

reviews.review_description: I looked everywhere and I almost gave up but I found it at the very end of the page and I have to play it no doubt😁😁😁

developer_response.body: Cool! Share your feedback after you play ;)

reviews.review_description:
Don't miss this game, so much fun to Play. Graphism is awesome and surprises are everywhere ! 
For all ages and users levels, all the family can play it. 
Love it ❤️

I'm not big on fps type games, but this one is super fun! I bought the full version as soon as I finished this demo. So colorful & all around fun. Definitely worth trying out & it's fun for all ages too!

developer_response.body: Thanks you very much! More fun is coming soon :)

reviews.review_description: Beautiful graphics.  Could be a fun game but I can't get past 1st level.  Please consider an OPTION to have endless ammo or automatic reload with a flick of the wrist.
This game is so refreshing. It uses vibrant colors and even wants you to play more. My niece and nephew would not stop playing and saying this is their new fav game.
Fun stand in place shooter. Shoot candy at doughnuts, cakes, and other sweets while some of them shoot back at you. The vibrant scenery is fun.
I love this game. I saw another one. With puzzles. I can't find it on quest to down load it. And also the other arcade games. Found the apos on face book.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Another one with puzzles is Sugar Mess Jigsaw Puzzles
